violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Sleeves of paper drink cups were stored on the floor in the drive thru window area. A box of white foam containers was stored in the floor by the stairs.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors under the fryers need to be cleaned.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
